<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me at row 02, column C is lava (`L`), which is deadly and must be avoided. I need to turn to find a safe cell to move forward. Looking at the map, turning downwards by turning right will face me towards row 03, column B, which is safe (floor `.`). So I will turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now I am at row 02, column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front of me at row 03, column B is floor (`.`), which is safe to move into. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<action>
